ground.cypher:
MATCH
    p1 = (q:Question {title: 'How to build a Cypher query?'})-[r1:ANSWERED]->(a:Answer {title: 'Correct Cypher syntax'})-[:COMMENTED_ON]->(q2:Question),
    p2 = (u:User {display_name: 'Neo4j Expert'})-[r2:ASKED]->(q),
    p3 = (u)-[r3:PROVIDED]->(a),
    p4 = (t:Tag {name: 'cypher'})-[r4:TAGGED]->(q),
    p5 = (a)-[r5:COMMENTED_ON]->(c:Comment {score: 50})-[r6:COMMENTED_ON]->(q3:Question)
RETURN p1, p2, p3, p4, p5
ground.question: How does the accepted answer for "How to build a Cypher query?" compare to the comments from the user Neo4j Expert on related questions, particularly those tagged with "cypher"?

cypher: MATCH (q:Question {title: "How to build a Cypher query?"}) -[:ANSWERED]->(a:Answer {is_accepted: true}),       (u:User {display_name: "Neo4j Expert"})-[:ASKED]->(oq:Question)-[:TAGGED]->(t:Tag {name: "cypher"}),       (u)-[:COMMENTED]->(c:Comment)-[:COMMENTED_ON]->(oq)\nRETURN a, c
